solution_criteria: The meal plan must be concise and cover a single day.
The meal plan must explicitly support muscle gain, indicating high protein content.
The plan must include 3 to 5 distinct meals or snacks.
The plan must not include any dietary restrictions.
task_description: Write a compact , concise 1 day meal plan for single athlete
scenario: Test Case: Muscle Gain, No Restrictions. Athlete: Male, 180cm, 80kg. Goal: Muscle gain. Restrictions: None. Expected: A concise, high-protein meal plan with appropriate caloric intake for muscle synthesis, covering 3-5 meals/snacks.

solution_criteria: The meal plan is compact, concise, and covers one full day.
All suggested meals and snacks are suitable for a vegan diet.
The plan reflects a caloric deficit appropriate for weight loss.
The plan includes adequate protein sources from vegan foods suitable for an athlete.
task_description: Write a compact , concise 1 day meal plan for single athlete
scenario: Test Case: Weight Loss, Vegan Diet. Athlete: Female, 165cm, 70kg. Goal: Weight loss. Restrictions: Vegan. Expected: A compact, plant-based meal plan with a caloric deficit, ensuring adequate protein and nutrients from vegan sources.

solution_criteria: The output must be a concise, one-day meal plan.
The meal plan must explicitly accommodate a gluten-free restriction.
The meal plan must be suitable for an athlete focused on peak endurance training, emphasizing high-carbohydrate content.
The meal plan should provide sustained energy for intense training demands.
task_description: Write a compact , concise 1 day meal plan for single athlete
scenario: Test Case: Endurance Training, Gluten-Free. Athlete: Male, 190cm, 95kg. Goal: Peak endurance training (e.g., marathon prep). Restrictions: Gluten-Free. Expected: A concise, high-carbohydrate, gluten-free meal plan providing sustained energy for intense training demands.
